expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers highlight activation, persistence, deselection, and interaction safety for bar chart and heatmap
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly enumerates the case focus and maps it to Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement. It states the intent: "Validate that Phase 5b ... can explicitly cover ... Highlight activation ... persistence ... deselection ... Interaction safety ... for both: Bar chart, Heatmap" and then provides "Concrete plan coverage" sections for both "Bar chart — highlight lifecycle" and "Heatmap — highlight lifecycle" covering activation/persistence/deselection/interaction safety.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly framed as "Phase5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and details Phase 5b contract requirements and behaviors: "Required Phase 5b outputs" (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, phase5b draft) and "Required Phase 5b behaviors" (shipment-readiness checkpoint pass; refactor plan; release recommendation; disposition accept/return phase5a/return phase5b). The verdict states: "Phase 5b is correctly positioned and contractually capable of enforcing this checkpoint focus".
